audit_items.proof_trace: Within rpc_server_stream.h, all functor/callback invocations are guarded by explicit null checks before use: `if (_received_request_callback)` (L109), `if (callback)` in on_sent (L91) and on_send_failed (L101). The only unguarded pointer (message in send_response) is not dereferenced in this file—it is passed directly to the parent class method async_send_message. The property holds for all code paths within rpc_server_stream.h.
